My Account Page (Hide View Button on Orders)
code:
/* =========================================================
   FT — MY ACCOUNT PAGE (HIDE VIEW BUTTON ON ORDERS)
   ---------------------------------------------------------
   Scope:   My Account > Orders table
   Purpose: Hides the "View" action button column from the
            orders table on the My Account page. This
            removes both the column header and every row's
            View button, since the order number link already
            takes customers to the order detail page —
            making the View button redundant.
   ========================================================= */

td.woocommerce-orders-table__cell.woocommerce-orders-table__cell-order-actions,
th.woocommerce-orders-table__header.woocommerce-orders-table__header-order-actions {
  display: none;
}

title: Navigation Menu Icons (Instagram, YouTube, Contact)
Jetpack Video Fix (Player Embed Position)
code:
/* =========================================================
   FT — JETPACK VIDEO FIX (PLAYER EMBED POSITION)
   ---------------------------------------------------------
   Scope:   Any page with embedded video via Jetpack
   Purpose: Fixes a known Jetpack defect where the
            MediaElement.js video player container gets
            position:absolute or position:relative applied
            by default, which breaks the layout and prevents
            video headers and player embeds from rendering
            and playing correctly. Resetting to position:
            unset restores normal document flow.
   ========================================================= */

.mejs-container {
  position: unset !important;
}
